use_cases: Display rotating customer testimonials on landing pages to build social proof
Showcase user reviews and feedback in product showcase sections
Present client quotes in portfolio or agency websites
Feature endorsements in SaaS pricing or about pages
Create interactive testimonial walls with auto-play and manual navigation
ai_summary: A reusable testimonial carousel component featuring auto-play, looping navigation, keyboard support, and smooth animations via framer-motion. Supports customizable accent colors, avatar images, and two visual variants (card/minimal) with full accessibility compliance. Designed for flexible integration across landing pages, product showcases, and marketing sections.
